CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Priority_Account_override__c, 'Priority Account'), 'True - Overridden', IF( ISPICKVAL(Priority_Account_override__c, 'Not Priority'), 'False - Overridden', IF( AND( Employees_Min__c >= 11, OR( ISPICKVAL(Business_Unit__c, 'Strategic'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'B2B Software'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Consulting and Market Research'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'CPG, Food & Beverages'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Financial services'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Media and Entertainment'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Retail / eCommerce'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'AdTech and AdNetwork'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Travel and Hospitality'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Logistics and Shipping'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Agency'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Hedge Funds and Asset Management'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Private Equity and Venture Capital'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Classifieds'), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, 'Payments') ) ), 'True', 'False' ) ) )
CustomField.label: Priority Account
